message:
fix: correct test struct definitions and improve upgrade error handling

Test fixes:
- TestRobotPlanHandlerDispatch: Fix struct to match actual response
  (generated_at, recommendation, actions, warnings) instead of success/error
- TestRobotSnapshotFlagParsing: Fix struct to match actual response
  (beads_summary, agent_mail) instead of outdated beads.ready/in_progress
- TestRobotGraphFlagParsing: Fix struct to use generated_at/available
  instead of success/error
- TestRobotSnapshotWithBeadLimit: Fix struct to use beads_summary

Upgrade error improvements:
- Add "exact" match annotation for platform match with name mismatch
- Helps diagnose version mismatch scenarios in upgrade errors
- Add test case for exact match version differs scenario

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,6 +104,10 @@ func (e *upgradeError) Error() string {
 	for _, asset := range e.AvailableAssets {
 		var marker, suffix string
 		switch asset.Match {
+		case "exact":
+			// Semantic exact match (OS+Arch) but name didn't match - unusual, check version/naming
+			marker = warnStyle.Render("?")
+			suffix = warnStyle.Render(" ← platform match, name mismatch (check version?)")
 		case "close":
 			marker = warnStyle.Render("≈")
 			suffix = warnStyle.Render(" ← closest match")
